audits.title: IT General Controls Audit
audits.desc: Detailed review of IT General Controls covering logical access, change management, backup/recovery, and computer operations across core systems.
audits.scope: All central IT servers, Active Directory, network firewalls, and core database systems.
audits.criteria: ISO 27001:2022 standards and corporate security policies.

findings.title: Stale user accounts in Active Directory
findings.desc: 15 user accounts belonging to terminated employees were found active in the directory, posing a risk of unauthorized access.

findings.title: Lack of quarterly log review evidence
findings.desc: Evidence of log reviews for database servers was missing for Q2. Standard procedures require signing off logs monthly.

issues.title: System Access Delay
issues.desc: Users are experiencing delays when attempting to access the main dashboard, affecting daily operational logging.
issues.cause: Server timeout due to high load
issues.recommendation: Increase server capacity during peak hours and optimize query indexing.
issues.response: We are upgrading the servers this weekend and scheduling performance tuning checks.

comments.text: Initial audit field work has commenced. Standard checklists are being followed.
Initial findings list compiled and shared with the IT department head for feedback.

audits.title: Procurement Process Audit
audits.desc: Independent review of corporate procurement cycles, vendor onboarding processes, pricing structures, and matching invoices.
audits.scope: All procurement files above $50k registered during H1 2025.
audits.criteria: Corporate Procurement Policy and Standard Accounting Practices.

findings.title: Missing signature on Purchase Order PO-1029
findings.desc: A purchase order of value $12,500 was approved without the mandatory second signature from the procurement lead.

tasks.title: Gather H1 vendor lists and sample purchase invoices

comments.text: Audit initialized. Currently waiting for procurement records download from the ERP system.

audits.title: Board Governance Review
audits.desc: External review of board operations, charter updates, and executive performance monitoring frameworks.
audits.scope: Board meeting minutes, conflict of interest declarations, and governance charter.

findings.title: Conflict of interest statements delay
findings.desc: Three board members completed their annual conflict of interest disclosures two weeks past the established deadline.

tasks.title: Review conflict of interest disclosure reports

comments.text: Board meeting minutes have been analyzed. Standard compliance checklists completed.
